title: Finance and investment analysts and advisers
description: Examine, evaluate, and investigate eligibility for or conformity with laws and regulations governing contract compliance of licenses and permits, and perform other compliance and enforcement inspection and analysis activities not classified elsewhere. Inspect and investigate sources of pollution to protect the public and environment and ensure conformance with Federal, State, and local regulations and ordinances. Monitor and evaluate compliance with equal opportunity laws, guidelines, and policies to ensure that employment practices and contracting arrangements give equal opportunity without regard to race, religion, color, national origin, sex, age, or disability. (Based on 20 related US occupations.)

tasks.task: Implement financial planning recommendations or refer clients to someone who can assist with plan implementation.
Train other examiners in the financial examination process.
Attend meetings, seminars, and programs to learn about new products and services, and develop new skills.
Develop marketing strategies to compete with other individuals or companies selling insurance.
Monitor insurance claims to ensure they are settled equitably for clients and insurers.
Review audit reports to monitor adequacy of scope and discover weaknesses in internal routines.
Perform administrative tasks, such as maintaining records and handling policy renewals.
Confer with clients to obtain and provide information when claims are made on a policy.
Ensure that policy requirements are fulfilled, including medical examinations and completion of forms.
Investigate activities of institutions to enforce laws and regulations and ensure legality of transactions.
Prepare reports, exhibits, and schedules detailing an institution's compliance with laws and regulations, and recommend solutions.
Review balance sheets, operating income and expenses, and loan documents to confirm institution assets and liabilities.
Interview prospective clients to gather data on their financial needs and discuss existing coverage.
Sell various types of insurance policies to individuals and businesses, including specialty policies.
Recommend actions to ensure compliance with laws and regulations, or to protect the solvency of institutions.
Prepare reports related to investigations of equal opportunity complaints and verify case information through interviews.
Inspect government property to ensure compliance with contract specifications or legal requirements.
Conduct internal or external audits and monitor follow-up actions in cases of violations found.
Monitor or trace the location of goods and facilitate clearance of goods through customs.
Examine permits, licenses, applications, and records to ensure compliance with licensing requirements.
Investigate alleged licensing or permit violations and report law or regulation violations to appropriate agencies.
Sign documents on behalf of clients, using powers of attorney.
Provide advice on transportation options, types of carriers, or shipping routes, and contract with freight forwarders for destination services.
Insure cargo against loss, damage, or pilferage and obtain necessary import documentation, such as customs invoices or certificates of origin.
Monitor and evaluate compliance with equal opportunity laws and ensure employment practices give equal opportunity regardless of race, religion, sex, or disability.
Parse and analyze financial or operational performance of companies to identify or recommend remedies and assess companies as investments for clients.
Gather data on financial information to inform investment decisions, and evaluate risks related to investments including green technologies.
Evaluate and compare the relative quality of various securities and determine prices at which they should be syndicated and offered to the public.
Prepare plans of action for investments through financial analyses, and recommend investments and timing to clients or firms.
Prepare reports on economic trends, business conditions, or secure investment analyses, and provide statistical modeling advice.
Confer with clients for debt restructuring or refinancing, and advise them on aspects of capitalization, timing, and market scenarios.
Develop and maintain client relationships while preparing materials and presentations regarding investment proposals.
Monitor sales staff performance to ensure goals are met, and direct and supervise employees engaged in sales or specific services.
Listen to and resolve customer complaints regarding services or products, ensuring timely processing and review of complaints.
